title: The5ers Complete Guide: Setup, Features & Tips (2026)

meta_description: The5ers Complete Guide: Setup, Features & Tips (2026). The5ers (4.2★, $95/mo). Step-by-step setup, features walkthrough, and pro tips. Updated 2026.
excerpt: Complete guide to setting up and using The5ers — from account creation to pro-level tips.
content:
I'll write a comprehensive setup guide for The5ers. Let me create the HTML content for TradingToolsHub.com.

```html

What is The5ers?

The5ers is a proprietary trading firm founded in 2016 that allows retail traders to access funded trading accounts and scale their capital up to $4 million based on performance. Headquartered in Raanana, Israel, the platform specializes in forex trading but also supports stocks and cryptocurrencies, making it particularly appealing to swing traders and professional traders looking to grow beyond their personal capital. The firm offers multiple program types with profit splits reaching up to 100%, meaning you keep every dollar you earn after meeting performance benchmarks. With a strong 4.2/5 rating and pricing starting at $95/month for evaluation accounts, The5ers combines accessibility with serious scaling potential for traders willing to demonstrate consistent profitability.

How to Create Your The5ers Account

Getting started with The5ers is straightforward and typically takes 10-15 minutes from signup to funding your first account. Here's the step-by-step process:

  • Visit the website and click "Start Trading." Navigate to The5ers official site and locate the account creation button. You'll be prompted to choose your starting program tier (see pricing section below).
  • Provide your basic information. You'll need your email address, full name, country of residence, and password. The5ers requires basic KYC (Know Your Customer) information to comply with regulations, so have your identification document ready.
  • Verify your email address. Check your inbox for a confirmation link from The5ers and click it within 24 hours. This step confirms you have access to the email you provided.
  • Complete identity verification. Upload a government-issued ID (passport, driver's license, or national ID) and proof of address (utility bill or bank statement from the last 3 months). Most verifications complete within 1-2 hours, though they can take up to 24 hours during high-volume periods.
  • Fund your account. Once verified, you can purchase your chosen evaluation program via credit card, debit card, or cryptocurrency. After payment clears, you'll receive your funded trading account details and login credentials.
  • Download the trading platform. The5ers provides access to MetaTrader 4 (MT4) or MT5 integration with their proprietary API. Download your preferred platform and log in with the credentials provided in your account email.
  • Review your program terms. Read through your specific program's rules regarding daily loss limits, maximum drawdown, and profit target thresholds before placing your first trade.

The entire process from signup to your first trade typically takes 1-2 hours if you have your documents ready. The5ers does not charge account creation fees—you only pay for the evaluation program itself.

Setting Up The5ers for the First Time

Once logged in, you'll see The5ers' trader dashboard, which consolidates trading, analytics, and account management in one interface. Start by exploring these key areas:

Account Overview Tab: This displays your current balance, available margin, equity, and real-time profit/loss. You'll also see your progress toward your profit target (the amount you need to earn to pass the evaluation and gain access to larger accounts). For example, if you're in the $6K Hyper Growth program, you'll see your target typically set at $600 profit or a specific percentage gain.

Risk Management Settings: Before placing trades, configure your daily loss limit. The5ers enforces automatic account suspension if you hit your daily loss cap (usually 5% of account balance). This is a critical rule—set your trading platform's position sizing accordingly. Visit Settings > Risk Rules to review these limits.

Performance Analytics Dashboard: This section shows your trading statistics including win rate, average win/loss, profit factor, and drawdown percentage. The5ers tracks these metrics in real-time, so you can monitor whether you're on track to pass your evaluation phase.

Trading Rules Widget: Pin this to your dashboard. It displays your remaining profit target, daily loss limit remaining, maximum drawdown threshold, and session duration rules. The5ers imposes specific trading windows for different programs, so understanding these upfront prevents rule violations that could result in account termination.

Broker Connection Status: Verify that your MT4/MT5 platform is synced with The5ers' servers. You should see a green connection status indicator. If this shows red or yellow, reconnect before trading to ensure your trades are being logged properly.

Essential Features You Should Know

1. Performance Analytics

The5ers provides detailed trade-by-trade analytics including entry price, exit price, risk/reward ratio, and time held. Unlike basic broker dashboards, The5ers analytics are specifically designed to evaluate whether you meet their profitability criteria. Review your monthly report to understand your edge and identify which trading setups generate consistent returns.

2. Automated Trading Support

The5ers permits algorithmic trading and Expert Advisors (EAs) on most programs. You can connect your own trading bots or use pre-vetted EAs from The5ers' marketplace. This is particularly valuable for swing traders who want to execute trades 24/5 without being glued to their screens. Configure your EA parameters in MT4/MT5 settings before deployment.

3. Risk Management Tools

Beyond daily loss limits, The5ers enforces maximum drawdown caps (typically 10% on evaluation accounts) and daily win/loss thresholds. These rules protect the firm but also protect you from over-leveraging. Set your position size to ensure you never risk more than 1-2% of your account balance per trade, keeping you well within The5ers' limits.

4. Social Trading Features

The5ers includes a trader community where you can share strategies, discuss market conditions, and post your trading journal. This isn't a copy-trading platform, but the social component helps newer traders learn from experienced ones. Access the Community tab to join relevant discussion groups for your trading style.

5. Education Hub

The5ers provides webinars, video tutorials, and trading guides covering market analysis, risk management, and psychology. Most content focuses on forex since it's The5ers' primary market. Review the education content during your evaluation phase to ensure you're trading within The5ers' preferred methodology.

6. Multiple Program Types

The5ers offers different program structures—evaluation phases where you prove yourself, as well as proprietary accounts with different risk/reward profiles. Some programs focus on steady 5% monthly gains, while others reward higher returns. Choose your program based on your natural trading style rather than forcing yourself into a mold.

7. Scaling Up System

This is The5ers' biggest differentiator. Once you pass a program, you can scale to larger accounts (up to $4 million over time). Each scaling stage requires specific profit targets and drawdown management. The scaling ladder is transparent—you'll see exactly what you need to achieve to reach the next tier.

The5ers Pricing: Which Plan Should You Choose?

Hyper Growth $6K ($0/month): This is the entry-level prop firm program with a $6,000 funded account. You don't pay any monthly fee, making it the most accessible option. To pass the evaluation, you typically need to hit a $600 profit target (10% gain) without exceeding a 5% daily loss limit or 10% total drawdown. This program is ideal for beginners and traders testing their strategies with real capital before committing financially. However, the small account size means modest daily profits—a $600 profit on $6K only nets you $300-500 in actual earnings depending on profit split terms.

Hyper Growth $20K ($0/month): A $20,000 account with no monthly fee, requiring a $2,000 profit target (10% gain) to pass. This program appeals to intermediate traders who've successfully traded smaller accounts and want to scale without paying monthly fees. The larger account size means daily profits are more meaningful—$100 daily gains are realistic. Profit splits on this tier typically start at 70% (you keep 70%, The5ers takes 30%), scaling to higher percentages as you prove yourself.

High Stakes $100K ($0/month): For serious traders, the $100,000 account requires a $10,000 profit target but offers the largest scaling potential. This program is gated—you typically can't start here but must graduate from smaller accounts. If you can access it, the profit splits are more favorable (up to 80-100%), and the account size allows you to scale to larger positions and generate meaningful income.

The $95/month Option: This is a faster-track evaluation program where you pay $95 monthly instead of proving yourself on a free evaluation. This gives you immediate access to larger account sizes and better profit splits without the evaluation phase. Use this if you're confident in your trading ability and want to skip the 2-4 week evaluation grind.

Recommendations by trader type: Beginners should start with Hyper Growth $6K (free, low risk, real capital). Intermediate traders with 6+ months of consistent results should try Hyper Growth $20K to prove their edge at scale. Advanced traders should evaluate whether the paid fast-track or the free evaluation grind makes more sense based on their confidence and time constraints.

Pro Tips for Getting the Most Out of The5ers

  • Document your trading edge before starting. The5ers evaluation accounts only last a few weeks. Before funding your account, trade a demo for at least 2-4 weeks and identify your three most profitable setups. Focus exclusively on these during your evaluation to hit profit targets faster.
  • Set your position size based on The5ers' rules, not your habits. If The5ers limits daily losses to $300, work backward: if your stop-loss is typically 50 pips on EURUSD, calculate the lot size that keeps you at or below $300 loss. Write this down and don't exceed it. Many traders fail evaluations by overleveraging.
  • Use The5ers' analytics to pass, then iterate. During evaluation, prioritize hitting the profit target. After you pass and get your first scaling account, use the detailed performance analytics to optimize your strategy. The5ers' data will show which setups have the best risk/reward ratio.
  • Take advantage of the 24/5 forex market with automated trading. The5ers allows EAs on most programs. If your edge works during specific market sessions (London open, US open), automate those hours so you don't miss them due to time zones or sleep.
  • Join The5ers' community group for your market focus. If you trade forex, find the forex-specific group. If you trade stocks/crypto, find those communities. These groups often share real-time setups, market analysis, and help you avoid rules violations that others have encountered.
  • Plan your scaling progression before starting. Know exactly how you'll trade on $20K that's different from $6K, and how you'll trade on $100K differently still. Scaling up means tighter profit targets and more pressure—your strategy needs adjustments at each level.
  • Track your evaluation deadline. Evaluation accounts have time limits (usually 60 days). Set a calendar reminder at day 45. If you're not on pace to hit profit targets, you need to either adjust your approach or prepare to restart the evaluation.

Common The5ers Issues and How to Fix Them

Issue 1: Account Suspended Due to Daily Loss Limit

Problem: You hit The5ers' daily loss cap mid-day and your account is locked until tomorrow. This is frustrating when you have a setup ready to trade.

Solution: Recalculate your position sizing using The5ers' official position calculator (found in the Risk Management section). Many traders underestimate their risk exposure. Your stop-loss distance × your lot size must never exceed your daily loss limit. Set a hard rule: once you've lost 50% of your daily allowance, close your platform until the next day.

Issue 2: Strategy Works on Demo But Not on The5ers

Problem: Your backtested strategy showed 60% win rate, but you're only hitting 30% on The5ers' live account. Panic ensues.

Solution: The5ers uses real-time quotes and you're trading against real spreads, unlike demo platforms. Review The5ers' performance analytics to see your actual win rate and average win/loss. Compare this to your demo results—if it's significantly different, your demo settings were unrealistic. Adjust your entry/exit rules to be more conservative and test for 1-2 weeks before concluding the strategy doesn't work.

Issue 3: Profit Splits Lower Than Expected

Problem: You passed the evaluation and your account says you're at 70% profit split, but marketing mentioned up to 100%.

Solution: Profit splits on The5ers are tiered—you start lower and scale up as you demonstrate consistency. Hitting a 10% profit target on your first pass typically locks you at 70% split. To reach 80%+, you need consecutive profitable months with specific metrics (low drawdown, consistent returns). Check your account terms document, which explains the exact scaling criteria for your program.

Issue 4: MT4 Connection Keeps Dropping

Problem: Your connection status shows yellow/red, and you're concerned trades aren't being logged.

Solution: First, restart MT4. If the issue persists, log into The5ers trader dashboard and verify your broker credentials are current. The5ers occasionally updates their API credentials—you may need to re-enter your broker login in MT4's Tools > Options > Accounts section. If still disconnected, open a support ticket—this is usually resolved within 1-2 hours.

Is The5ers Worth It? Our Verdict

The5ers is worth considering if you're a serious trader ready to scale beyond your personal capital and you have a documented trading edge. The 4.2/5 rating reflects strong trader satisfaction, the scaling up to $4 million is industry-leading, and the ability to earn profit splits up to 100% makes this genuinely lucrative for consistent traders. However, it's not for everyone—the rules are strict, the evaluation phases are competitive, and if your strategy doesn't work at the account size The5ers provides, you'll be out your evaluation fee ($0-$95 depending on program). We recommend The5ers for swing traders, forex specialists, and intermediate-to-advanced traders who've already proven profitability on smaller accounts. If you're still learning or your strategies are untested, start with a smaller prop firm or continue demo trading. For a more comprehensive comparison, see our full The5ers review or explore how it compares to FTMO and Fundednext.

```
author: TradingToolsHub Editorial
